title: USB Design System Samples
content: I built a multi-brand design system in Figma for US Bancorp using collections and variables for theming. The system covers color tokens, typography, and a component library — structured so a single variable swap pushes brand changes across everything downstream. Note that these are only a few samples of the whole project.

images.caption: Brand Style Map Configuration: The token management layer showing multiple brand variants — heading colors, logo color maps, header settings, and interactive states. Each brand maps to the same variable structure (Brand ID, blues, purples, accents) so the component library inherits brand changes without touching individual components.

Color System: The full color token library — a neutral grayscale scale, status colors (danger, success, info, warning), interactive button states, and brand-specific palettes for each client (Fidelity, Acme Windstone, etc.) in lightened, standard, and darkened variants.

Brand Asset Library: Logos and brand marks organized for use across the system — Fidelity, Cardmember Service, Acme United, Harley-Davidson Visa, and browser compatibility icons. All assets are maintained here so component theming pulls from a single source.

Notification Component Variations: The four notification types — Info, Success, Error, and Warning — each with consistent structure: status icon, message content, and close button. Shown in both standard and margin-spaced layout variants.

Footer Component Variations: Four footer variants showing different spacing and layout arrangements, all maintaining the required structural elements: disclosures, navigation links, security indicator, and copyright for Elan Financial Services.
Typography Scale: The headings component across 72 variants, shown in a 3x2 grid — H1 through H4 at each size with consistent spacing and visual rhythm across brand applications.

Link Card Component Library: Grid of Link Card variants — white rounded cards with teal headings, gray body text, and right-facing chevrons. Variations cover different content lengths, optional metric badges, date stamps, and superscript annotations.

Global Header System: Header documentation across five brand variants — Acme United, Harley-Davidson Visa, Fidelity, Cardmember Service, and bank. Each shows full navigation structure, utility links, responsive mobile states with hamburger menus, and a component breakdown of Upper and Lower Header sections.
